<!-- Thanks for contributing to Riverleaf! Keep this PR focused on one change. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link the related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Formatting behavior (`src/formatter/*` — layout / segmenter / render)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / examples only
- [ ] Tooling / CI / packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated a YAML case in `test/cases/*.yaml` that captures this behavior (test-first)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Formatting is idempotent — `format(format(x)) === format(x)` (the runner asserts this per case)
- [ ] Examples use the astronomy dictionary — no real / business names or data
- [ ] Repo content (code, comments, docs, test descriptions) is in English
- [ ] Updated the README / docs if user-facing behavior changed
